text.title: EF Core Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping workload + query shape to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.question: Query needs `Include` over multiple collection navigations?

conclusion.verdict: .AsNoTracking() + DTO projection; single query is fine
use a unit-of-work that saves multiple repositories within one DbContext transaction
single aggregate write; repository.SaveChangesAsync(ct) inside method
skip-this-methodology: stored-procedure-first apps belong to Dapper/raw SQL patterns

text.example: workload=read_heavy → multi_collection_include=true (Items + Discounts) → apply splitquery-multi-include: .AsSplitQuery().AsNoTracking().Select(new OrderDto(...)).
